A2 Vocabulary: Time & Calendar

Essential vocabulary for dealing with time, predicting the future, and talking about the past. Notice how these words pair perfectly with verbs in the Aorist or Future tense!

1. Days of the Week (Οι μέρες της εβδομάδας)

Note: All days are feminine except for Saturday and Sunday. - η Δευτέρα (ee thef-té-ra) = Monday - η Τρίτη (ee trí-tee) = Tuesday - η Τετάρτη (ee te-tár-tee) = Wednesday - η Πέμπτη (ee pém-ptee) = Thursday - η Παρασκευή (ee pa-ra-ske-ví) = Friday - το Σάββατο (to sáv-va-to) = Saturday - η Κυριακή (ee kee-rya-kí) = Sunday

2. Time Expressions (Εκφράσεις χρόνου)

  • σήμερα (sí-me-ra) = today
  • αύριο (áv-ryo) = tomorrow (use with Simple Future: Θα πάω αύριο)
  • χθες / εχθές (hthes / e-hthés) = yesterday (use with Aorist: Πήγα χθες)
  • τώρα (tó-ra) = now
  • μετά (me-τά) = later / after
  • πριν (preen) = before

3. Frequency (for the "Video" Continuous verbs)

  • πάντα (pán-da) = always
  • συχνά (see-hná) = often
  • κάθε μέρα (ká-the mé-ra) = every day
  • ποτέ (po-té) = never (used with δεν: Δεν παίζω ποτέ = I never play)

Practice Grammar: Unit 11: Future Tenses (Θα)
